title: quercus lanuginosa var. oblongata
intro: Quercus lanuginosa var. oblongata, also known as the small-leaved birch or Japanese white birch, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia, belonging to the Quercus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Quercus lanuginosa var. oblongata include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and soothing skin irritations, among others. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
